channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: UTEM Code Security - Wed May 06 15:18:19 UTC 2026
item.description:
UTEM Code Security brings the UTEM (Unified Threat Exposure Management) platform's code-scanning engine into your JetBrains IDE. The plugin wraps the utem-cli binary...
vendor: Innavoto Utem downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.innavoto.utem

item.title: Reader Yip - Thu May 07 03:29:44 UTC 2026
item.description:
Reader Yip is a lightweight reading utility for JetBrains IDEs. It provides an editor-native reading hint for local TXT and EPUB files, configurable chapter splitting...
vendor: Reader-plugin-yip downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.reader.jetbrains

item.title: Typecek - Thu May 07 11:30:23 UTC 2026

item.title: Walkthrough - Fri May 08 12:52:43 UTC 2026

item.title: Deepseek Pet - Sun May 03 18:17:01 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: WhyLine - Thu May 07 16:39:46 UTC 2026
